creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2008-03-22 20:36:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/sphinxbase     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/sphinxbase/files patch-configure.in 
                           patch-src-libsphinxad_ad_oss_bsd.c 
                           patch-test-unit-test_case_ucase3.test 
  Log:
  Sphinx Base is part of a large-vocabulary, speaker-independent, continuous
  speech recognition engine.
  
  This port is required for PocketSphinx and Sphinx3
  
  Once the system is built, try running the Perl script sphinx-demo.
  The sphinx-test script should run sphinx-batch over an example
  utterance of "go forward ten meters."
  
  WWW:  http://www.speech.cs.cmu.edu/sphinx/
  
  PR:             ports/121611
  Submitted by:   Richard Neese <r.neese@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.936     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/audio/sphinxbase/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/sphinxbase/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/audio/sphinxbase/files/patch-configure.in (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/audio/sphinxbase/files/patch-src-libsphinxad_ad_oss_bsd.c (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/audio/sphinxbase/files/patch-test-unit-test_case_ucase3.test (new)

  1.1       +54 -0     ports/audio/sphinxbase/pkg-plist (new)
